behavior_summary: NEC1::use is the 'U8P_NEC1::use' handler for a Necromancer NPC. When the player activates the NPC it: sets item info/process exclusion, guards against an early-exit via the global deathSpeakCast, puts the avatar into brief stasis, spawns location-based helper/effect scripts, plays a short frame-based animation on the NPC, and runs a conversation/teaching sequence determined by the NPC's Item::getQuality() value (stages 1..4).

Each quality branch produces multi-line dialog via Item::bark, may teach a spell or perform a teleport/fade sequence, and marks progression using metNec1..metNec4 so later interactions change behavior.
NEC1::look is a short helper invoked on 'look' that sets item info/exclusion and barks the string 'Necromancer '.
notable_control_flow: Early guard: script checks global deathSpeakCast on entry and will alter/skip the normal sequence if set (read guard).
Stage branching: behavior is routed by Item::getQuality() with distinct code paths for quality==1,==2,==3,==4.
Progress gating: each stage checks the corresponding metNecN flag and only performs teaching/progression actions when appropriate, then writes the metNecN flag to mark completion.

Synchronous scripted sequence: the handler places the avatar in stasis (setAvatarInStasis), spawns effects at the NPC's coordinates (Item::getX/Y/Z -> spawn), animates the NPC via a small Item::setFrame loop, and uses fade/teleport processes for scene transitions on completion.
open_questions: Exact text and mechanical effects of the spells taught in each quality branch are inferred but not present in this excerpt (strings show dialog but spell mechanics handled elsewhere).
Precise semantics and timing of the spawned routines (FREE::* and NEC1::* spawn targets) are unknown; they likely produce visual effects or follow-up behaviors but are not defined here.
Whether NEC1::use ever calls NEC1::look internally (they appear as separate event handlers) — the relationship is unknown from the provided data.

Any side-effects on other global flags (beyond metNec1..metNec4 and deathSpeakCast) caused by spawned processes or later steps (e.g., setting talkedToDeadDudes in a related script) are not fully tied to this file's execution.

main_function.name: U8P_NEC1::use
main_function.purpose: Handle player 'U8P_NEC1::use' interaction with a Necromancer NPC: present stage-specific dialog, teach spells or trigger scripted progression based on the NPC's quality, spawn visual/effect processes at the NPC location, animate the NPC briefly, and set progression flags so future interactions change behavior.
entry_conditions: Triggered when the player uses/activates the Necromancer NPC (U8P_NEC1::use event).
Normal sequence guarded by the global deathSpeakCast flag (script checks this flag at start and may early-exit or alter behavior).
Branches on Item::getQuality() to select which stage/dialog to run.

function_map.name: U8P_NEC1::use
function_map.role: Primary 'U8P_NEC1::use' event handler implementing multi-stage dialog/teaching progression and small scripted effects/animation.

function_map.name: U8P_NEC1::look
function_map.role: 'look' event handler: set item info/exclusion and bark the short identifier 'Necromancer '.

function_map.name: Item::bark
function_map.role: Engine call used to present dialog lines / short messages from the NPC to the player.

function_map.name: U8P_NEC1::setAvatarInStasis
function_map.role: Temporarily restrict player input/movement during scripted dialog sequences.

function_map.name: spawn
function_map.role: Create helper/effect scripts or processes (used to spawn FREE::* and NEC1::* child routines at NPC coordinates).

function_map.name: Item::getX
function_map.role: Read NPC X coordinate for spawning location-tied effects/processes.

function_map.name: Item::getY
function_map.role: Read NPC Y coordinate for spawning location-tied effects/processes.

function_map.name: Item::getZ
function_map.role: Read NPC Z/floor coordinate for spawning location-tied effects/processes.

function_map.name: Item::setFrame
function_map.role: Animate the NPC by setting display frames inside a small loop.

function_map.name: Item::getQuality
function_map.role: Return an integer quality/state value used to select which Necromancer-stage branch executes (1..4).

function_map.name: U8P_NEC1::process FadeToBlack / process FadeFromBlack
function_map.role: Screen transition effects used during teleport/fade sequences for scene changes.

function_map.name: Npc::teleport
function_map.role: Teleport/move the player or NPC during scripted progression (used in some stage completions).

external_calls.purpose: Deliver NPC dialog lines and short messages to the player's process during conversation branches.
Put the avatar in stasis to prevent player control/movement during the scripted sequence.
Fetch the NPC's X coordinate to U8P_NEC1::use when spawning location-based effects/processes.
Fetch the NPC's Y coordinate to U8P_NEC1::use when spawning location-based effects/processes.
Fetch the NPC's Z/floor coordinate to U8P_NEC1::use when spawning location-based effects/processes.
Spawn FREE::* or NEC1::* child processes/effects at the NPC location (visuals, helpers, follow-up routines).
Animate the NPC through a short frame loop (progresses frame index 1..8).
Read the NPC's quality value that determines which dialog/teaching branch executes.
Perform screen fade transitions to conceal teleportation or scene changes during certain completions.
Teleport the player/NPC as part of stage completion sequences (used in conjunction with fades).

reads.name: deathSpeakCast
reads.likely_effect: Early-exit/alter execution if set; prevents the normal Necromancer dialog/sequence from running.

reads.name: metNec1
reads.likely_effect: Checked to determine whether the player has already completed the quality==1 stage; gates repeat teaching/dialog.

reads.name: metNec2
reads.likely_effect: Checked in the quality==2 branch to gate progression or dialog.

reads.name: metNec3
reads.likely_effect: Checked by higher-quality branches to gate dialog/progression.

reads.name: metNec4
reads.likely_effect: Checked by the final-quality branch to gate dialog/progression.

writes.name: metNec1
writes.likely_effect: Set when the NPC teaches the first-stage spell or completes the quality==1 branch; used to mark progression so later interactions change behavior.

writes.name: metNec2
writes.likely_effect: Set when the second-stage teaching completes; progression marker for quality==2 branch.

writes.name: metNec3
writes.likely_effect: Set on completion of the third-stage teaching; progression marker for quality==3 branch.

writes.name: metNec4
writes.likely_effect: Set on completion of the final-stage teaching; progression marker for quality==4 branch.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: NEC1::use is the 'U8P_NEC1::use' handler for a Necromancer NPC. When the player activates the NPC it: sets item info/process exclusion, guards against an early-exit via the global deathSpeakCast, puts the avatar into brief stasis, spawns location-based helper/effect scripts, plays a short frame-based animation on the NPC, and runs a conversation/teaching sequence determined by the NPC's Item::getQuality() value (stages 1..4).
